response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of broad software-development experience, a CS degree, and genuine open-source and Linux depth, which aligns well with the technical core of the role. However, this is an executive-level leadership position and the resume shows little formal team-leadership or people-management track record beyond a self-founded project. Most critically, the role requires German at minimum C1, and the candidate lists German as only 'Basic'—a hard requirement that is not met. UML/modeling and Python (both listed skills) are also absent.
strengths: Extensive, broad software-development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Strong open-source orientation and Linux/Unix background, plus founder of an open-source platform
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentoring via workshops, courses, and TDD/craftsmanship practices
concerns: German listed as 'Basic'—fails the minimum C1 language requirement
Limited formal leadership / team-management experience for an executive-level Head of Development role
No mention of UML modeling or Python, both named in required/desired skills
